approvalGate: Runtime mutation approved by owner for cca-linuxpod-spike-* smoke resources only; no private workloads, registry login, prune, global cleanup, or host-destructive changes.

plannedActions.details: Create an experiment-owned working directory under docs/evidence/linuxpod-base-overhead/runtime/ with prefix cca-linuxpod-spike-.
plannedActions.name: prepare-state-directory

plannedActions.details: Resolve a local vmlinux kernel and ghcr.io/apple/containerization/vminit:0.26.5 initfs without registry login.
plannedActions.name: resolve-kernel-and-initfs

plannedActions.details: Create one LinuxPod VM with 4 CPUs and 1GiB memory for comparison against Apple container CLI cgroup/runtime memory.
plannedActions.name: create-linuxpod

plannedActions.details: Add one Alpine rootfs container running sleep infinity.
plannedActions.name: add-idle-container

plannedActions.details: Collect pod.statistics memory/cpu/block I/O plus /proc/1 RSS.
plannedActions.name: collect-idle-stats

plannedActions.details: Stop LinuxPod, delete experiment-owned rootfs/state, and verify no cca-linuxpod-spike-* state remains.
plannedActions.name: cleanup-owned-state

statusReason: Runtime smoke completed; hostRuntimeRSSBytes is runner process RSS while the VM is alive and includes Swift/ImageStore overhead.
